turns.question: Hi, welcome in, how are you doing today?
turns.answer: I'm doing great, thanks, how about you?

turns.question: Hey there, first time here?
turns.answer: Actually, yeah, this is my first visit.

turns.question: Welcome! Are you dining in or taking it to go?
turns.answer: I'll be staying in, thanks.

turns.question: Hi, is it your first time ordering here today?
turns.answer: No, I actually come here pretty often.

turns.question: Good morning, how's your day going so far?
turns.answer: Pretty good so far, just needed some coffee.

turns.question: Hey, welcome back! The usual today?
turns.answer: Actually, I think I'll try something different today.

turns.question: Hi there, just one moment and I'll be right with you.
turns.answer: No rush, take your time.

turns.question: Welcome in, are you ready to order or still deciding?
turns.answer: Still deciding, give me a second, please.

turns.question: Hey, how's it going? Cold one out there today, huh?
turns.answer: Yeah, freezing, perfect coffee weather though.

turns.question: Hi, sorry for the wait, how can I help you?
turns.answer: No worries at all, I just got here.

turns.question: Good afternoon, are you a rewards member with us?
turns.answer: Yes, I am, I'll scan my app.

turns.question: Hey there, table for one or is someone joining you?
turns.answer: Just me today, thanks.

turns.question: Hi, welcome in, what can we get started for you?
turns.answer: Give me just a second to look at the menu.

turns.question: Good morning, busy day ahead for you?
turns.answer: Pretty busy, yeah, hoping this coffee helps.

turns.question: Hey, nice to see you again, back for more?
turns.answer: Ha, yeah, couldn't stay away.

turns.question: Hi there, are you here to pick up a mobile order?
turns.answer: No, I'll be ordering here in person today.

turns.question: Welcome in, do you need a minute with the menu?
turns.answer: Yes, please, just a minute would help.

turns.question: Hey, how's your morning treating you?
turns.answer: Not bad, just running a little late today.

turns.question: Hi, thanks for coming in, what brings you by today?
turns.answer: Just craving something sweet, honestly.

turns.question: Good afternoon, are you meeting someone or just grabbing coffee?
turns.answer: Just grabbing coffee for myself today.

turns.question: Hey there, how's the weather treating you outside?
turns.answer: Actually really nice today, finally some sun.

turns.question: Hi, welcome in, any big plans for the rest of your day?
turns.answer: Nothing too crazy, just work after this.

turns.question: Good morning, you're here early today.
turns.answer: Yeah, needed an early start today.

turns.question: Hey, is this seat taken, or are you all set?
turns.answer: No, it's all yours, go ahead.

turns.question: Hi there, would you like to start a tab or pay per order?
turns.answer: I'll just pay for this one, thanks.

turns.question: Welcome back, did you enjoy your drink last time?
turns.answer: I really did, that's why I'm back.

turns.question: Hey, sorry about the line, thanks for your patience.
turns.answer: No worries, it wasn't too bad.

turns.question: Hi, are you ordering for just yourself today?
turns.answer: Yeah, just me this time.

turns.question: Good afternoon, how can we make your day a little better?
turns.answer: Honestly, just a good coffee would do it.

turns.question: Hey there, welcome in, cutting it close on time today?
turns.answer: Ha, yeah, running a bit behind schedule.

turns.question: Hi, are you familiar with our seasonal menu?
turns.answer: Not really, could you tell me a bit about it?

turns.question: Welcome in, sorry, we're a little short-staffed today.
turns.answer: No problem at all, I understand.

turns.question: Hey, nice jacket, staying warm out there?
turns.answer: Ha, thanks, trying my best in this weather.

turns.question: Hi there, are you looking for something hot or cold today?
turns.answer: Something cold, it's warm out there today.

turns.question: Good morning, did you already check out the app?
turns.answer: Not yet, I usually just order at the counter.

turns.question: Hey, welcome, is this your regular spot?
turns.answer: Yeah, I come here almost every day.

turns.question: Hi, how's your week been so far?
turns.answer: Pretty good, just glad it's almost the weekend.

turns.question: Welcome in, do you know what you're in the mood for?
turns.answer: Not yet, mind if I take a quick look?

turns.question: Hey there, are you paying with the app today?
turns.answer: Yes, I'll just scan when I'm ready.

turns.question: Hi, thanks for waiting, what can I get started for you?
turns.answer: No problem, I'll have a look first.
